title: Community Owned Dex on HL: Kittenswap
summary_title: KittenSwap: Building the Community-Owned DEX on HyperEVM
summary_description: Shinji from KittenSwap discusses concentrated liquidity pools, points distribution, and why they're winning the DEX wars on HyperEVM.

key_moments.label: Introduction to KittenSwap and founders' DeFi background
Why they chose to build an AMM on HyperEVM and lessons from Curve Wars
Concentrated liquidity pools explained and advantages over standard AMMs
Token distribution strategy: 30% airdrop and why decentralization matters
Points program mechanics and how users earn tokens early
Upcoming features: gauges, flight school, and automated liquidity management
Yield strategies: stable coin pools with triple points opportunities
Call to action: follow KittenSwap, join Discord, deposit in pools
